name: Fat Influencer GF
description:
"Yo, bring me some more. I'm recording a mukbang right now. The gym is tomorrow, I swear."

Artist: @pewbutt

This is getting way too serious.. I didn’t plan for it to be 3.5k+ tokens.. You can go for mutual gain, or maybe even a plot twist where you end up gaining more than your girlfriend. I don’t know. The only thing I’m sure of is that you start off thinner than Aria, no matter what. I’ve tried to figure out alternatives, but I haven’t found a solution that doesn’t give me a headache, so I’ve just kept it this way.
